title: Disconnect after write is unknown and never replayed

preconditions.description: The harness holds the inherited device-keyed lease before any device or fixture access.
The harness recorded session generation, display, layout, lock state, ATX-observable state, browser identity, and fixture identity.
The adapter records write boundaries and can lose the bound channel after the first ATX write without a complete receipt.
The harness provisions each linked tool call with its valid owned session, required capability, and a separately captured fresh observation when the handler consumes one.

fault_script.action: Arm a one-shot post-write disconnect for jetkvm_display_capture only.
fault_script.expected_effect: The read request write is accepted, acknowledgement is absent, and the public read error retains outcome null.

fault_script.action: Clear the display-capture disconnect injector.
fault_script.expected_effect: No later cell inherits this fault.

fault_script.action: Arm a one-shot post-write disconnect for jetkvm_display_status only.
fault_script.expected_effect: The read request write is accepted, acknowledgement is absent, and the public read error retains outcome null.

fault_script.action: Clear the display-status disconnect injector.
fault_script.expected_effect: No later cell inherits this fault.

fault_script.action: Arm a one-shot post-write disconnect for jetkvm_input_keyboard only.
fault_script.expected_effect: The linked mutation is unknown after one dispatched action and is never replayed.

fault_script.action: Clear the keyboard disconnect injector without reopening its unknown mutation gate.
fault_script.expected_effect: No later cell inherits this fault and the unknown request is not replayed.

fault_script.action: Arm a one-shot post-write disconnect for jetkvm_input_mouse only.
fault_script.expected_effect: The linked mutation is unknown after one dispatched action and is never replayed.

fault_script.action: Clear the mouse disconnect injector without reopening its unknown mutation gate.
fault_script.expected_effect: No later cell inherits this fault and the unknown request is not replayed.

fault_script.action: Arm a one-shot post-write disconnect for jetkvm_input_paste only.
fault_script.expected_effect: The linked mutation is unknown after its request write and is never replayed.

fault_script.action: Clear the paste disconnect injector without reopening its unknown mutation gate.
fault_script.expected_effect: No later cell inherits this fault and the unknown request is not replayed.

fault_script.action: Arm a one-shot post-write disconnect for jetkvm_input_release only.
fault_script.expected_effect: The linked mutation is unknown after its request write and is never replayed.

fault_script.action: Clear the input-release disconnect injector without reopening its unknown mutation gate.
fault_script.expected_effect: No later cell inherits this fault and the unknown request is not replayed.

fault_script.action: Arm a one-shot post-write disconnect for jetkvm_power_control only.
fault_script.expected_effect: The linked ATX mutation is unknown after one accepted write and is never replayed.

fault_script.action: Clear the power disconnect injector without reopening its unknown mutation gate.
fault_script.expected_effect: No later cell inherits this fault and the unknown ATX request is not replayed.

fault_script.action: Arm a one-shot post-write disconnect for jetkvm_session_connect only.
fault_script.expected_effect: The linked connect is unknown after its request write and is never replayed.

fault_script.action: Clear the session-connect disconnect injector without reopening its unknown mutation gate.
fault_script.expected_effect: No later cell inherits this fault and the unknown connect is not replayed.

fault_script.action: Arm a one-shot post-write disconnect for jetkvm_session_reconnect only.
fault_script.expected_effect: The linked reconnect is unknown after its request write and is never replayed.

fault_script.action: Clear the session-reconnect disconnect injector without reopening its unknown mutation gate.
fault_script.expected_effect: No later cell inherits this fault and the unknown reconnect is not replayed.

fault_script.action: Arm a one-shot post-write disconnect for jetkvm_session_status only.
fault_script.expected_effect: The read request write is accepted, acknowledgement is absent, and the public read error retains outcome null.

fault_script.action: Clear the session-status disconnect injector.
fault_script.expected_effect: The story leaves no disconnect injector armed.

steps.expect: CONNECTION_LOST read ToolError with phase execute, outcome null, verification none, safe_to_retry true, required_next_step reconnect_then_capture, and details.downstream_stage acknowledgement. Separately, adapter telemetry records exactly one accepted capture request write, zero acknowledgements, zero replay writes, and no image block.
The one-shot fault is cleared; inspection, authoritative release, and reconnect establish a new current owned session before the next cell without replaying the prior request.

CONNECTION_LOST read ToolError with phase execute, outcome null, verification none, safe_to_retry true, required_next_step reconnect_then_capture, and details.downstream_stage acknowledgement. Separately, adapter telemetry records exactly one accepted status request write, zero acknowledgements, and zero replay writes.
The fault is cleared; inspection, release, reconnect, and a fresh keyboard capture establish the next current binding without replay.

CONNECTION_LOST mutation ToolError with phase execute, outcome unknown, verification none, safe_to_retry false, required_next_step inspect_device_state_before_retry, details.failed_action_index 0, details.dispatched_action_count 1, details.completed_action_count 0, and details.downstream_stage acknowledgement. The unknown gate is retained and adapter telemetry records zero replay writes.
The unknown request remains closed; inspection, release, reconnect, and a fresh mouse capture establish the next current binding without replay.

CONNECTION_LOST mutation ToolError with phase execute, outcome unknown, verification none, safe_to_retry false, required_next_step inspect_device_state_before_retry, details.failed_action_index 0, details.dispatched_action_count 1, details.completed_action_count 0, and details.downstream_stage acknowledgement. The unknown gate is retained and adapter telemetry records zero replay writes.
The unknown request remains closed; inspection, release, reconnect, and a fresh paste capture establish the next current binding without replay.

CONNECTION_LOST mutation ToolError with phase execute, outcome unknown, verification none, safe_to_retry false, required_next_step inspect_device_state_before_retry, null public action counts, and details.downstream_stage acknowledgement. The unknown gate is retained; adapter telemetry records exactly one accepted request write, zero acknowledgements, and zero replay writes.
The unknown paste request remains closed; inspection, release, and reconnect establish the next current binding without replay.

CONNECTION_LOST mutation ToolError with phase execute, outcome unknown, verification none, safe_to_retry false, required_next_step inspect_device_state_before_retry, null public action counts, and details.downstream_stage acknowledgement. The unknown gate is retained; adapter telemetry records exactly one accepted request write, zero acknowledgements, and zero replay writes.
The unknown release request remains closed; inspection, release, reconnect, and ATX-baseline proof establish the next current binding without replay.

CONNECTION_LOST mutation ToolError with phase execute, outcome unknown, verification none, safe_to_retry false, required_next_step inspect_device_state_before_retry, null public action counts, and details.downstream_stage acknowledgement. The unknown gate is retained; adapter telemetry records exactly one accepted ATX write, zero acknowledgements, and zero replay writes.
The unknown ATX request remains closed; inspection restores and proves the ATX baseline, closes the prior session, and prepares an unowned connect state without replay.

CONNECTION_LOST mutation ToolError with phase connect, outcome unknown, verification none, safe_to_retry false, required_next_step inspect_device_state_before_retry, null public action counts, and details.downstream_stage acknowledgement. The unknown gate is retained; adapter telemetry records exactly one accepted connect write, zero acknowledgements, and zero replay writes.
The unknown connect remains closed; uncertain publication is inspected and cleaned before a new current owned session is established without replay.

CONNECTION_LOST mutation ToolError with phase execute, outcome unknown, verification none, safe_to_retry false, required_next_step inspect_device_state_before_retry, null public action counts, and details.downstream_stage acknowledgement. The unknown gate is retained; adapter telemetry records exactly one accepted reconnect write, zero acknowledgements, and zero replay writes.
The unknown reconnect remains closed; inspection, release, and reconnect establish a new current owned session before the final read cell without replay.

CONNECTION_LOST read ToolError with phase execute, outcome null, verification none, safe_to_retry true, required_next_step reconnect_then_capture, and details.downstream_stage acknowledgement. Separately, adapter telemetry records exactly one accepted session-status request write, zero acknowledgements, and zero replay writes.

pass.assertion: Every explicit mutation call returns canonical CONNECTION_LOST/unknown with safe_to_retry false and required_next_step inspect_device_state_before_retry; each unknown mutation gate performs zero replay writes.

The explicit display capture, display status, and session status read calls return CONNECTION_LOST at phase execute with outcome null, verification none, safe_to_retry true, required_next_step reconnect_then_capture, and downstream_stage acknowledgement without mutation gate semantics.

Each tool-specific one-shot fault is cleared before executable inspect-release-reconnect recovery establishes the next current session and any required fresh observation; separate adapter telemetry proves one accepted write, zero acknowledgements, and zero replay writes.

evidence.source: The schema-validated mutation and read ToolError envelopes from each explicit ordered fake or replay call.

Ordered adapter telemetry separately proving one accepted downstream write, zero acknowledgements, zero automatic replay writes, and completed inspect-release-reconnect recovery for every faulted call.

restore.action: Invoke generation-correlated emergency input release when a session exists.
restore.assertion: No held key, button, wheel producer, macro, or paste producer remains.

restore.action: Stop and join any Reliable Paste producer.
restore.assertion: Reliable Paste is inactive and its correlated producer is joined.

restore.action: Verify the fixture reports zero held keys and buttons.
restore.assertion: Held keyboard and pointer state is empty.

restore.action: Close only the device session created by this story and its browser resources.
restore.assertion: No story-owned browser, channel, or device session remains.

restore.action: Clear deterministic faults and restore the recorded fixture baseline.
restore.assertion: The next story starts only after the safe baseline is verified.

restore.action: Restore the recorded ATX-observable baseline using the reviewed fixture procedure while retaining the device lease.
restore.assertion: The baseline ATX-observable state is proven before the next story starts.

privacy.rule: Persist only allowlisted opaque identifiers, sanitized versions, counts, durations, hashes, outcomes, verification, and restoration results.
